Crescent Fighting Gloves  
 

No Trade
Slot: HANDS
AC: 3
DEX: +6 STA: +3 ENDUR: +10
SV POISON: +2
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: MNK
Race: HUM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: HANDS
AC: 3
DEX: +6 STA: +3 ENDUR: +10
SV POISON: +2

Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 10:12:45
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 40
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Crypt of Dalnir
NPC Name
a kly follower
the Kly Overseer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Crypt of Dalnir

Crescent Fighting Gloves item window 2017

Uploaded October 27th, 2017 by snailish
Send a correction
Post Comment
Crescent Vs. wu's
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2002 at 12:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966042648
11 posts
Which is better to wear, crescent or wu's?
▲ Page top
RE: Crescent Vs. wu's
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2002 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757755117
View User Forum
47 posts
Crescent is better but if you still have your Wu's gloves, keep them in your outside inventory for a great light source.

Once you save up some money for some Silver Chitin Handwraps, that's a great replacement for the Crescent Gloves.
▲ Page top
RE: Crescent Vs. wu's
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2002 at 3:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966214579
Guru
120 posts
Personnaly I do not really like Silver Chitin Hand Wraps for Monks. You should go for a Haste item that does NOT go in Hand slot, so you still have your Haste item when you get your Epic. Epic Haste is a song so it stacks with item Haste. It is your choice, but I do not like SCHW.

Peace out.
▲ Page top
RE: Crescent Vs. wu's
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2002 at 7:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255099263
10 posts
But after you get your epic sell your SCHW and get FBSS you should have enough money from the gloves.
▲ Page top
RE: Crescent Vs. wu's
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2002 at 10:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
Better yet, by the time you get your epic you'll probably have enough money to sell the SCHW and buy a better waist-slot Haste item with AC; FBSS is much cheaper than SCHW these days, but I'd much rather have that extra 10AC for the next 20-odd levels while saving up some cash to go towards future replacements... post-nerf, high AC is vital for any Monk who gets hit much.

Edited, Fri Dec 20 10:31:00 2002
▲ Page top
Decent
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 6:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760087363
53 posts
Good for the extra sta, and dex if you need to raise weapon skills. Otherwise I'm not too sure these are worthwhile for a lvl 40 monk.
▲ Page top
RE: Decent
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2002 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253443712
65 posts
I have a lvl 41 monk and most my armor is better than this and i have never bought any of it...i either found it exploring...or a few friendly iksar monks gave me some of it on one of my many trips to the bank 8) and i still have a few pieces of wu...cloak...hands...wrist...and i would like to know what i should try to look for next...i am mainly concerned with AC not as much as stats...but sta/agi/dex increases would be nice

where should i hunt and what to look for...and whats that blue armor i see all the monks round my lvl wearing(with the new SoL graphics at least its blue)???

i also need better head and neck the 1s i have now are too heavy for what i want...still under weight tho 8)

I got mine today from a kly evoker I think. It was on the second floor. Have never even been to the 3rd floor. Also got shoes on 2nd floor as well. Thats my 2 cps

can't be sure, but...
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 1:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I don't think these will drop off the Overseer. Anything is possible, but I got mine off a follower also and saw another set come off a follower. All the research I have done indicates they specifically drop of the Kly Follower. He is much lower level than the Overseer. But, again I'll say, anything is possible.
